name: Post-Retirement Medical and Life Insurance Reserve

eligibility.description: Requires actuarial determination and must be funded on a level basis over the working lives of covered employees; subject to nondiscrimination rules.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows for an additional reserve in a welfare benefit fund to be funded over the working lives of employees to provide post-retirement medical and life insurance benefits.
